items.title: The Sixers' signing of Rayan Rupert is official. He will wear No. 12.

items.title: Only reported Sixers transaction yet to be made official is the Rayan Rupert two-way signing.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Only reported Sixers transaction yet to be made official is the Rayan Rupert two-way signing.

items.title: Here is the full summer league roster. Labaron Philon and Johni Broome are on it, and new two-way signees Caleb Love and Rayan Rupert are not.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Here is the full summer league roster. Labaron Philon and Johni Broome are on it, and new two-way signees Caleb Love and Rayan Rupert are not. 

First game in Vegas is Thursday.

items.title: Love -- who averaged 10.4 points and 2.5 assists in Portland as a rookie last season -- joins the 76ers after Mark Bartelstein and Torrian Jones of @PrioritySports finalize an agreement Friday. The 76ers have added Anfernee Simons, Rayan Rupert and now Love over the last day.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Love -- who averaged 10.4 points and 2.5 assists in Portland as a rookie last season -- joins the 76ers after Mark Bartelstein and Torrian Jones of @PrioritySports finalize an agreement Friday. The 76ers have added Anfernee Simons, Rayan Rupert and now Love over the last day.

items.title: Rayan Rupert is 6-foot-7 and 205 pounds with an elite 7-foot-3 wingspan. With the first of their three two-way contracts, the Sixers are betting on his tools:
items.author: Adam Aaronson

Rayan Rupert is 6-foot-7 and 205 pounds with an elite 7-foot-3 wingspan. With the first of their three two-way contracts, the Sixers are betting on his tools:

media.title: Report: Sixers sign Rayan Rupert to two-way contract
media.description: Rayan Rupert's tools – he stands at 6-foot-7, weighs 205 pounds and has an elite 7-foot-3 wingspan – make him an intriguing prospect.

items.title: Can confirm Rayan Rupert has agreed to sign a two-way contract with the Sixers. It's their first two-way of this transaction cycle. Rupert has played in 155 games with 20 starts across three NBA seasons with the Blazers and Grizzlies.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt: Can confirm Rayan Rupert has agreed to sign a two-way contract with the Sixers. It's their first two-way of this transaction cycle. Rupert has played in 155 games with 20 starts across three NBA seasons with the Blazers and Grizzlies.

items.title: The Philadelphia 76ers have agreed to sign French guard Rayan Rupert on a two-way NBA deal, sources tell ESPN. Rupert, a second-round pick in 2023, split last season in Memphis and Portland.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: The Philadelphia 76ers have agreed to sign French guard Rayan Rupert on a two-way NBA deal, sources tell ESPN. Rupert, a second-round pick in 2023, split last season in Memphis and Portland.

items.title: The only two-way contract free agent for the Memphis Grizzlies is Rayan Rupert, a 2023 second round pick. Richie Saunders (ACL) could slide into that spot with 2025 second round picks Javon Small and Jahmai Mashack occupying the other two spots.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt: The only two-way contract free agent for the Memphis Grizzlies is Rayan Rupert, a 2023 second round pick. Richie Saunders (ACL) could slide into that spot with 2025 second round picks Javon Small and Jahmai Mashack occupying the other two spots.
